response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical expertise across multiple domains, including AI-agent infrastructure, cloud technologies, and full-stack development. While his experience aligns well with the technical requirements, his background lacks explicit director-level leadership or deep AI strategy focus, which slightly limits his fit for this principal engineer role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and infrastructure engineering experience (15+ years) with diverse technologies, including AI-agent infrastructure and cloud platforms.
Proven entrepreneurial mindset through founding GISCollective and contributing to open-source projects with real-world adoption.
Strong technical leadership in mentoring, workshops, and craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, pairing), demonstrating ability to inspire teams.
concerns: No explicit director-level individual contributor experience or evidence of shaping high-level AI/cloud strategy for large organizations.
Lacks advanced degrees (Master's/PhD) in AI-related fields, which are preferred for this role.
AI expertise is primarily in tooling (e.g., MCP code generators) rather than building AI-powered products or platforms at scale.
